metadata.name: Create a New Training Course in LMS

description: The L&D team is launching a new 'Project Management' workshop and needs to add it to the LMS.

nodes.task_description: Gather the course details: title, description, learning objectives, instructor, schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist collects all necessary information for the new course.

nodes.task_description: Create a new course and session in the LMS.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist successfully builds the new course shell in the system.

nodes.task_description: Publish the course to the LMS catalog so that employees can enroll.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist makes the course visible and available for enrollment.
